title: CallOutcome
description: FROZEN CONTRACT. Every completed negotiation terminates as exactly one customer-visible state: itemized_quote, callback_scheduled, or declined. Provider failures are operational events, not a fourth business outcome; they must be logged separately and may lead to a reviewed callback. Referenced by quote.json.

status.description: The single terminal state of the call.

callback_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp for a scheduled callback.
